category_sources: source_facts.description says it aligns proteins to genomes with splicing and frameshift.
source_facts.homepage is the official miniprot documentation site under lh3.github.io.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use miniprot.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage points to lh3.github.io/miniprot, with the manual page at /miniprot.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/lh3/miniprot, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies protein-to-genome alignment, splicing, and frameshift context.
source_facts.executables lists miniprot as the CLI executable.
